title: Crispy Portuguese Pork Skewers
description: Salty and crunchy pork skewers marinated in a sweetsavory Portuguese blend, perfect for mealprep and ketofriendly evenings.

ingredients.name: Caster sugar
ingredients.notes: adds a hint of sweetness; optional for strict keto

ingredients.name: Wooden skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked 30 min in water if wooden

instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk together salt, pepper, paprika, garlic powder, caster sugar, olive oil, chopped rosemary, and lemon zest to form a sticky paste.
2. Add the pork cubes to the bowl, tossing until all pieces are evenly coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, preferably 2‑4 hours for deeper flavor.
3. If using wooden skewers, ensure they are soaked to prevent burning during grilling.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat (about 200‑220 °C / 400‑425 °F).
5. Thread 1‑2 pork cubes onto each skewer, leaving a small gap between cubes for even cooking.
6. Place the skewers on the grill, cooking 3‑4 minutes per side, rotating occasionally, until the pork is golden, crisp on the outside and reaches an internal temperature of 71 °C (160 °F).
7. While grilling, optionally brush a thin layer of the remaining sauce on the skewers for extra glaze.
8. Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes; this helps retain juices and crispness.
9. Serve hot or let cool completely and store in airtight containers for up to 4 days for meal‑prep. Garnish with extra rosemary or lemon zest if desired.
